# Zero-touch OS provisioning: PXE installs & galleries 🟡

**Goal.** Go from 'boots the network' to 'installs an OS with no keystrokes' across Anaconda/kickstart and debian-installer/preseed — then pick any variant from an upstream gallery.

**Audience:** you can serve + netboot; now install an OS unattended  
**Effort:** ⏱ half-day+  
**Prerequisites:** [The netboot pipeline: build → serve → boot](path-netboot-pipeline.md)

| # | Lab | You'll learn | Checkpoint (observable) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [`almalinux-pxe-lab`](../almalinux-pxe-lab/) 🔗 | zero-touch AlmaLinux 9 via an Anaconda kickstart. | Anaconda installs with no keystrokes; the second boot comes off disk. |
| 2 | [`rocky-pxe-lab`](../rocky-pxe-lab/) 🔗 | the Rocky twin (+ the CIQ Lorax real-hardware path). | the full ~15-min install completes and reboots into the OS. |
| 3 | [`kali-pxe-lab`](../kali-pxe-lab/) 🔗 | the debian-installer + preseed cousin (not Anaconda). | a preseed install completes; explain the `vda`-pinning that stops d-i clobbering the iPXE ROM disk. |
| 4 | [`libvirt-ipxe-http-pxe`](../libvirt-ipxe-http-pxe/) 🔗 | libvirt's own iPXE ROM fetches the DHCP bootfile over HTTP — no TFTP; then TLS verified vs the lab CA. | the whole flow comes off one `python3 -m http.server`; with the `https/` extension a rogue cert makes iPXE refuse. |
| 5 | [`virtualbmc-ipmi-lab`](../virtualbmc-ipmi-lab/) | give a VM an IPMI BMC and drive it like bare metal — `ipmitool … bootdev pxe`. | power round-trip, then a PXE kickstart install, then `bootdev disk` boots the OS you just provisioned (the OpenStack-Ironic lifecycle in miniature). |
| 6 | [`FREEBSD-simple-templating-serving-RHEL-kickstart-files`](../FREEBSD-simple-templating-serving-RHEL-kickstart-files/) | a FreeBSD box `sed`-templates a kickstart and serves AlmaLinux via an OEMDRV ISO (no PXE at all). | `ksvalidator` passes the rendered `ks.cfg`; the OEMDRV ISO builds on both GNU and BSD `sed`. |
| 7 | [`rocky-kickstart-gallery`](../rocky-kickstart-gallery/) | install any of ~34 upstream Rocky-9 kickstart variants. | `select-kickstart.sh GenericCloud-Base` then a zero-touch install boots off disk. |
| 8 | [`kali-preseed-gallery`](../kali-preseed-gallery/) | pick from ~15 upstream Kali preseed variants. | `select-preseed.sh headless-default` installs; explain the `/dev/sda`→`/dev/vda` auto-patch. |
| 9 | [`almalinux-kickstart-gallery`](../almalinux-kickstart-gallery/) | the AlmaLinux Packer kickstarts — where the `sda`→`vda` rewrite is load-bearing. | `select-kickstart.sh gencloud` installs; the fetch fails closed if any `sda` survives the rewrite. |
